result:
Both files are written and validated against every constraint:

**`summary.json`** — computed from all 30 rows of `data/sales.csv`:
- `total_revenue`: 7154.44, `orders`: 30, `median_order_value`: 204.94
- `top_product_by_revenue`: "Gadget"
- `revenue_by_region`: North 2176.35, East 1830.79, South 1732.48, West 1414.82

**`REPORT.md`** — 138 words total, with:
- Exactly the four required `##` headings in order, no other headings
- Overview states `$7,154.44` total revenue and 30 orders
- Exactly three recommendations bullets (15, 15, 13 words each), each grounded in the data
- None of the banned words present

A verification script re-derived every number from the CSV and checked the JSON keys, rounding, median, heading list/order, word cap, bullet count/length, and banned-word list — all passed. No commits were made.
